title: Helpful Campfires
description: Small tweaks to campfires to make them worth building
body: [![Explore Mods Button Link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8df3ae95ef20a2470bd7009a7a26bd24880b1a86.png)](https://khazoda.com) ![Mod Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df92ef42bc97da8eda8c65b3bdcea980694a5686.png) ## Passive Effects - Walking near a lit campfire **activates** it - ![regeneration heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d373e99109d7bba6e7ee35ebcbe94208b2f8bd7a.png) **Activated** campfires give nearby players regeneration. - ![jump boost icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5824b048db49c3af1ed3ae89d3c3360bd3f4506.png) **Activated** soul campfires give jump boost. - **Active** campfires have new ambient sounds, sound effects and particles. ## Stump Chair - Crafted from a single log and piece of charcoal, this stump is the perfect aesthetic addition to any campfire. - Sit around a campfire with your friends and heal up during an adventure with the regeneration effect while cooking food. - Alternatively, place leashed animals on stumps similarly to how you would leash them to a fence post. ## SpookyJam - SpookyJam is a yearly mod jam with the theme being anything spooky/autumnal. Helpful Campfires was made for SpookyJam 2025. If you're interested in the event, please check out https://spooky-jam.com/ 👻
